title: Behind Trump's push to change Nebraska's electoral voting system
shortDescription: Deep-red Nebraska is one of two states that doesn't have a winner-take-all electoral voting system. Trump wants to change that.

title: Biden leads Trump in fundraising for 2024 presidential race: What we know
shortDescription: Here's a look at how the two presidential contenders' campaign coffers compare.

title: Under threat from MTG, Mike Johnson may need Democrats to save his job
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson faces blowback from conservatives who once embraced him. But Democrats say they're open to coming to his rescue if needed.

title: Joe Biden may not make Ohio ballot, Secretary of State warns
shortDescription: Ohio Secretary of State Frank LaRose is warning that Joe Biden won't make it on the Ohio ballot unless state lawmakers move a deadline.

title: Trump expected to raise $43 million at Palm Beach fundraiser
shortDescription: The fundraising haul comes as the four times indicted ex-president seeks to replenish campaign coffers and pay off surging legal bills.

title: Why Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson won't repeat Biden endorsement in 2024
shortDescription: WWE star Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson said he's focused on uniting the country ahead of the 2024 election and won't endorse Biden.

title: Biden raised $90 million in March. Trump's war chest isn't even close
shortDescription: The Democratic Party's war chest dwarfed Republicans' in March as the general election battle between Joe Biden and Donald Trump begins to take shape.

title: Exclusive: Donors rattled by Gaza war hold back on cash to Biden
shortDescription: Some donors skipped the New York City fundraiser − which was headlined by Barack Obama and Bill Clinton− in protest of Biden's policy on the Gaza war.

title: Democrats press Biden to change course on Israel and Gaza
shortDescription: The death of aid workers killed in a strike in Gaza have prompted new discussions about US support for Israel. Even some stalwart Israel allies are reassessing.

title: In Baltimore, President Biden urges Congress to act to rebuild bridge
shortDescription: President Joe Biden, visiting Baltimore, grieved with family members of the six workers killed during the Francis Scott Key Bridge.

title: CIA says whistleblower claim in Biden impeachment probe is 'false'
shortDescription: The CIA refuted a GOP-backed whistleblower allegation that the agency blocked a federal investigation into President Joe Biden's son, Hunter Biden.

title: Trump Airport? Or Trump Prison? Politicians battle over naming rights
shortDescription: Republicans want to rename Dulles airport after Donald Trump. Democrats introduced legislation renaming a federal prison in Miami after him.

title: Unboxing the secrets: Trump's trial explained
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump faces a legal battle over classified documents retrieved from Mar-a-Lago.

title: Trump bond rejected? NY AG questions if company is good for the money
shortDescription: The New York attorney general is questioning if Knight Specialty Insurance Company is good for former President Donald Trump's $175 million bond.

title: Support for Biden down among minority and young voters
shortDescription: Minority and young voter support for Joe Biden is down. Veuer's Elizabeth Keatinge has more.

title: Georgia judge rejects Trump request to dismiss election charges
shortDescription: Georgia judge rejects Trump request to dismiss election racketeering charges under 1st Amendment

title: Trump has pleaded not guilty to the 40-count indictment for retaining classified documents
shortDescription: The U.S. prosecutor leading the case against Donald Trump for retaining classified documents after leaving office pushed back on a federal judge after she signaled she may accept the former president's claim that the records were his personal property.

title: ‘Gullible’: Top Democrat hits GOP on CIA claims, impeachment inquiry
shortDescription: The top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee is going after Republicans' impeachment inquiry into President Joe Biden.

title: Daily Briefing: Biden's ultimatum to Israel
shortDescription: Biden says a cease-fire must happen and more news to know Friday.

title: RFK Jr. gets 2,000 signatures to get on the ballot in Idaho
shortDescription: Following a successful legal challenge, the former Democrat-turned-independent will be on the general election ballot in six states - just 44 more to go.

title: John Passidomo, husband of Florida Senate President, dies after hiking
shortDescription: Naples attorney John Passidomo, husband of Florida Senate President Kathleen Passidomo died after suffering a head trauma in a Utah hiking accident.

title: OnPolitics: Biden tells Netanyahu airstrikes on aid workers 'unacceptable'
shortDescription: The White House said it may change its policy on Israel's war against Hamas in Gaza unless Israel can outline "concrete" steps to reduce harm to civilians.

title: No Labels says it will not challenge Joe Biden and Donald Trump
shortDescription: Biden allies had criticized the No Labels effort, saying a third-party campaign would likely hurt Biden and lead to the re-election of Trump.
